acceptance_criteria: The PackFactory root has schema-valid objective, backlog, and work-state files.
Root memory refresh and root startup guidance point at those files as the canonical PackFactory work tracker.
completion_signals: contracts/project-objective.json, tasks/active-backlog.json, and status/work-state.json exist at the factory root.
tools/refresh_factory_autonomy_memory.py and the root docs acknowledge the root tracker.
escalation_conditions: The shared control-plane schemas prove too build-pack-specific to represent PackFactory root work cleanly.
tasks.summary: Seed the PackFactory root objective, backlog, and work-state files and wire root tooling to use them.

acceptance_criteria: The operator dashboard surfaces portfolio state, environment assignments, recent factory motion, and root task guidance clearly enough to replace long routine startup briefs.
The dashboard remains local-first and keeps the Python snapshot generator as the truth-preserving data-preparation layer.
completion_signals: The dashboard specs and implementation path align on the root executive-summary surface.
Routine PackFactory status checks no longer need a long chat-only reconstruction path.
escalation_conditions: A dashboard change would weaken the canonical registry-first truth model or create conflicting operator views.
tasks.summary: Advance the top-priority operator dashboard so it becomes the fast normal briefing surface for PackFactory state.

acceptance_criteria: PackFactory can declare whether a build-pack is local-factory-managed or remote-managed without leaving dual-primary ambiguity.
Startup surfaces and operator workflows make the chosen source-of-truth mode visible.
blocked_by: Postponed by operator on 2026-03-26T22:27:19Z until PackFactory chooses to resume source-of-truth mode work.
completion_signals: A bounded source-of-truth model is documented and represented in PackFactory surfaces.
The ADF drift/reconcile problem has a clear PackFactory-native handling path.
escalation_conditions: The proposed mode model cannot stay fail-closed across local state, remote-managed state, and import/reconcile workflows.
tasks.summary: Define and adopt the build-pack source-of-truth mode so local and remote-managed lines do not behave like competing primaries.

acceptance_criteria: The Astro dashboard path has a concrete install, build, and publish plan that keeps the Python snapshot generator canonical.
Operators have a bounded wrapper path for local dev-server and publish usage.
completion_signals: The Astro dashboard upgrade spec is concrete enough to implement without improvised environment wiring.
The Astro wrapper path stays clearly downstream of the Python snapshot generator.
escalation_conditions: The Astro presentation layer would require replacing the canonical snapshot contract or adding a live backend.
tasks.summary: Turn the Astro dashboard path into a concrete install and build plan that cleanly consumes the canonical Python snapshot output.

acceptance_criteria: PackFactory has a reusable personality-template model that stays optional and does not collapse template reuse.
Personality inheritance is explicit during template creation and build-pack materialization.
completion_signals: A bounded personality-template design exists with clear storage and selection surfaces.
One source template can still produce multiple build-packs with different personalities.
escalation_conditions: A proposed personality system would hard-link identity to a source template and reduce template reuse.
tasks.summary: Design the optional agent-personality template system as a reusable overlay rather than a one-template identity lock-in.

acceptance_criteria: Root and template instruction surfaces have a clearer scan order and lower repetition without losing critical policy content.
The redesign is grounded in instruction-retention and startup-performance goals rather than prose polish alone.
completion_signals: PackFactory has a bounded plan for instruction-surface optimization tied to real startup and compliance needs.
The dashboard work and instruction-performance work share a coherent reduction path for root startup overhead.
escalation_conditions: A proposed simplification would remove or weaken critical workflow rules such as the managed remote-session control plane.
tasks.summary: Review and optimize PackFactory instruction surfaces for scan speed, retention, and startup compliance.
